note: Field keys illustrate the custom field map; authoritative map lives in the CONVERTFLOW shared resolver and ghl-design.md. Fictional guest and brand; never a fleet client.
jobKeyFormula: pd- plus contactId plus first 16 hex of sha256 of the canonical submission

fields.podcast_survey_q1: The fastest way to grow more food for the neighborhood was to stop trying to grow more of it ourselves and to teach the neighbors instead.
fields.podcast_interview_smiq: Yes, the guest consented to have their story produced as a full episode and a book teaser.
fields.podcast_survey_stories: Greenhaven started on one borrowed hardware-store roof crammed with beds; a neighbor's teenager two buildings over asked to be taught; that untaught roof soon produced nearly as much as ours; the co-op shifted its hours and money into teaching, free starter crates, and an open Sunday workshop.
fields.podcast_survey__additional_info: The guest is uncomfortable being called a hero and wants the teaching framing centered, not their personal harvest.
fields.podcast_visual_description: A rooftop farm at golden hour over an eastern city skyline, rows of chard and bright peppers, beans climbing string, a person kneeling beside a young beginner.
